name: obsidian-didasync
description: Sync tasks between Dida365 or TickTick and your notes.

scripts.test:task-note-block: npx tsc --module commonjs --target ES2019 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-test tests/taskNoteBlock.test.ts src/taskNoteBlock.ts src/taskNotePath.ts src/types.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/taskNoteBlock.test.js
scripts.test:task-note-context: npx tsc --module commonjs --target ES2019 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-test tests/taskNoteContext.test.ts src/taskNoteContext.ts src/taskNotePath.ts src/types.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/taskNoteContext.test.js
scripts.test:task-note-path: npx tsc --module commonjs --target ES2019 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-test tests/taskNotePath.test.ts src/taskNotePath.ts src/types.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/taskNotePath.test.js
scripts.test:task-index: rm -rf .tmp-test && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --module commonjs --target ES2019 --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-test tests/taskIndex.test.ts src/taskIndex.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/taskIndex.test.js
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: CYZice
